zh.All Saints Churchyard, Naseby, Northampt: 英國諾薩普頓史爾納希比
zh.Naseby, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾納希比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Frances Astyll於1566年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾納希比時，她的父親William Astyll20歲，母親Luce Harbert20歲。她於1594年10月24日與George Yorke在英國諾薩普頓史爾納希比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年7月10日在她的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾納希比。

zh-hans.All Saints Churchyard, Naseby, Northampt: 英国諾薩普頓史爾納希比
zh-hans.Naseby, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾納希比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Frances Astyll于1566年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾納希比时，她的父亲William Astyll20岁，母亲Luce Harbert20岁。她于1594年10月24日与George Yorke在英国諾薩普頓史爾納希比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年7月10日在她的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾納希比。

nameMeanings.name: Astyll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of   Astle   or   Astill  .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

variants.name: Astill
meanings: 1  English: locative name variant of   Astle  .

2 Norman, English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Astill, a contraction of Norman French Ansketill (Old Scandinavian Ásketill, with Continental Germanic Ans- substituted for As-). See Askell .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Frances Astyll was born in 1566, in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England, her father, William Astyll, was 20 and her mother, Luce Harbert, was 20. She married George Yorke on 24 October 1594, in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 July 1614, in her hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Frances Astyll est née en 1566, à Naseby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William Astyll, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Luce Harbert, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé George Yorke le 24 octobre 1594, à Naseby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 juillet 1614, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Naseby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Frances Astyll 1566 in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Astyll 20 und ihre Mutter Luce Harbert 20. Sie hat am 24. Oktober 1594 in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England George Yorke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Juli 1614 im Alter von 48 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Frances Astyll è nata il nel 1566 nel Naseby, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, William Astyll, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Luce Harbert, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato George Yorke il 24 ottobre 1594, nel Naseby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 luglio 1614, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Naseby, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Frances Astyllが1566年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアナセビーで生まれた時，父William Astyllは20歳，母Luce Harbertは20歳であった。1594年10月24日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアナセビーでGeorge Yorkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年7月10日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアナセビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Frances Astyll(이)가 1566년 영국 노르섬프토실르 나세비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Astyll(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Luce Harbert(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1594년 10월 24일 영국 노르섬프토실르 나세비에서 George Yorke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 7월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 나세비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Frances Astyll nasceu em 1566, em Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Astyll, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Luce Harbert, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com George Yorke em 24 de outubro de 1594, em Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de julho de 1614, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Frances Astyll родилась в 1566 г. в местности неисеби, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Astyll было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Luce Harbert, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Yorke 24 октября 1594 г. в местности неисеби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 июля 1614 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности неисеби, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Frances Astyll nació en 1566, en Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Astyll, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Luce Harbert, tenía 20 años. Se casó con George Yorke el 24 de octubre de 1594, en Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de julio de 1614, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
